_comment: Coverage ratchet baseline — total LINE coverage % per suite, MEASURED from a real CI-equivalent run. The coverage-ratchet script compares each run against these (NOISE_TOLERANCE_PP slack). vitest: informational signal (the vitest.config thresholds are the hard gate). rust: HARD-GATED (the rust ratchet call passes --gate; a drop beyond tolerance fails the cargo-coverage job, which is in validate-all's needs). Re-baseline on main with `--update` after a deliberate change.
